title: rubus rotundatiformis
intro: Rubus rotundatiformis, also known as the Chinese Raspberry or Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Rubus rotundatiformis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent. Rubus rotundatiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
